TextView.android:text:
Exercise Guide

1. Brisk Walking
A great low-impact cardio workout; improves heart health and boosts your mood.

2. Push-Ups
Strengthens the chest, shoulders, and triceps using just your body weight.

3. Squats
Targets the glutes and quadriceps; essential for building lower body strength and stability.

4. Plank
Engages the entire core; improves posture and reduces the risk of back pain.

5. Jumping Jacks
A full-body warm-up that increases heart rate and improves coordination.

6. Lunges
Focuses on leg strength and balance; helps tone the hamstrings and glutes.

7. Yoga Poses
Combines stretching with strength; increases flexibility and reduces mental stress.

8. High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT)
Short bursts of intense activity; burns a high amount of calories in a short time.

9. Cycling
Excellent for cardiovascular fitness and building leg muscles without straining joints.

10. Swimming
A full-body workout that builds endurance and muscle strength while being gentle on the body.
